title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Data Quality — 5 Skills for Pipeline Validation and Anomaly Detection
description: For data engineers and analytics leads, this pack generates data contract definitions, row-level validation checks, statistical anomaly detection rules, data freshness monitors, and incident summary reports so they can catch data issues before they reach dashboards or decision-makers.
gumroad_description:
Bad data in dashboards destroys stakeholder trust. Catch it in the pipeline.

Who this is for:
— Data engineers who've been blamed for a bad number that slipped through
— Analytics leads running pipelines without formal data contracts
— Platform teams building data quality tooling for internal consumers

What's inside:
— Skill 1: Data contract definition generator
— Skill 2: Row-level validation check writer
— Skill 3: Statistical anomaly detection rule builder
— Skill 4: Data freshness monitor setup
— Skill 5: Incident summary report generator
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

Issues caught before they reach decision-makers. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
